# 决策疲劳

决策疲劳 is a core concept in cognitive science and psychology. Closely related to [[cognitive-biases]], [[dual-process-theory]]. These connections reflect important links in the knowledge network. Understanding these relationships helps build a comprehensive knowledge graph.
